modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty installing the Panopto application on a USD computer.

full_description_text:  
The user attempted to install the Panopto application on their USD computer but encountered issues during the process. This situation has prevented them from successfully completing the installation. Further details regarding the specific error or behavior experienced were not provided.
